task: Write a Python function that validates an AWS S3 bucket name according to AWS naming rules (3-63 characters, lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens, must start and end with alphanumeric)
Create a JSON object that represents an AWS IAM policy statement allowing read-only access to a specific S3 bucket
Write a regular expression that matches valid AWS EC2 instance IDs (format: i-followed by 8 or 17 hexadecimal characters)
